title: External MCP Server Meta
description: Metadata for external MCP servers available from npm or GitHub

description.description: Clear description of what this MCP server provides

package.description: npm package name or GitHub repo URL

command.description: Command to launch the MCP server (e.g., ['npx', '-y', 'package-name'])

auth_env.description: Environment variable name for the API key (when auth_type is api_key)

auth_provider.description: OAuth2 provider name (when auth_type is oauth2)

tools.description: List of tool names exposed by this server

capabilities.description: Keywords for runtime matching — used by acquire_tool() scoring

category.description: Server category (e.g., search, knowledge, entertainment, finance)
